subject: Create Docker Compose Configuration
description: Create docker-compose.yml for local development: services: web (builds from Dockerfile, ports: 3000:80, environment variables from .env). Create docker-compose.prod.yml for production: web service with restart: unless-stopped, logging configuration, health check (curl localhost:80/health). Add optional Supabase local development stack (supabase/supabase image) for offline development. Create .env.example with all required variables. Add volume for nginx logs. Document usage in docs/DOCKER.md including: docker-compose up -d, viewing logs, rebuilding after changes.
result_summary:
Added Docker Compose deployment artifacts for local and production use. Created docker-compose.yml with a containerized web service that builds the existing Dockerfile, publishes WORKTRACKER_WEB_PORT (default 3000), mounts an nginx_logs volume, and exposes an optional supabase profile using supabase/supabase:latest for offline-only smoke testing. Created docker-compose.prod.yml as a standalone production file with WORKTRACKER_HTTP_PORT (default 80), restart: unless-stopped, json-file log rotation, nginx log volume, and container-local /health health checks. Expanded .env.example with Compose/build variables (GOOGLE_IOS_REVERSED_CLIENT_ID, EAS_PROJECT_ID, WORKTRACKER_WEB_PORT, WORKTRACKER_HTTP_PORT, WORKTRACKER_IMAGE, WORKTRACKER_DOCKER_PLATFORM, DOCKER_LOG_MAX_SIZE, DOCKER_LOG_MAX_FILES, SUPABASE_LOCAL_PORT). Added docs/DOCKER.md covering local startup, logs, rebuilds, production usage, and the optional Supabase profile.

Validation:
- npm run typecheck: passed
- YAML parse validation via ruby/Psych: passed for both compose files
- git diff --check on task files: passed
- docker compose validation could not be run because this environment has neither the Compose v2 plugin (`docker compose`) nor the legacy `docker-compose` binary
- git pull --rebase was attempted before commit and failed because the shared worktree had unrelated unstaged changes
- Git commit created successfully: [task-040] Add Docker Compose configuration (f8972e8)

Definition of Done notes: input validation/auth/authz/error-path items were not applicable because this task only adds deployment configuration and documentation, not runtime request handling. No automated happy-path/error-path tests exist for these deployment artifacts in the repo; verification was limited to typecheck, YAML parsing, and diff checks.
